member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for LLM logging.

member.name: F:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions.SectionName
member.summary: Configuration section name in appsettings.json.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions.Enabled
member.summary: Whether LLM logging is enabled.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions.DatabasePath
member.summary: Path to the SQLite database file. If relative, will be resolved from application base directory.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions.RetentionDays
member.summary: How many days to keep log entries. Older entries will be deleted automatically. Set to 0 to keep logs indefinitely.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions.LogRequestMessages
member.summary: Whether to log the full request messages (can be large).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions.LogResponseData
member.summary: Whether to log the full response data (can be large).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Configuration.LLMLoggingOptions.EstimateCosts
member.summary: Whether to estimate and log costs. Requires cost estimation configuration per provider/model.

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext
member.summary: Provides ambient context for LLM logging metadata. Uses AsyncLocal to ensure thread-safe context storage across async operations.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.Current
member.summary: Gets or sets the current logging context for the current async flow.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.ProjectId
member.summary: Username who initiated this LLM call chain.
Project ID/name for this LLM call chain.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.Feature
member.summary: Feature/module that initiated this LLM call chain.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.Step
member.summary: Current step within the feature.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.ParentCallId
member.summary: Parent call ID if this is a nested/child LLM call.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.EmbeddedDocuments
member.summary: Embedded documents added to the context via RAG/similarity search. Each entry should contain document name, chunk, and relevance score.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.BeginScope(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new logging context scope.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.SetProjectId(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the current step within the existing context.
Updates the project ID within the existing context.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.LLMLoggingContext.SetParentCallId(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the parent call ID for child/nested LLM calls.

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.EmbeddedDocument
member.summary: Represents a document that was embedded into the LLM context via RAG/similarity search.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.EmbeddedDocument.DocumentName
member.summary: Name or identifier of the document.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.EmbeddedDocument.Chunk
member.summary: The text chunk that was embedded.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.EmbeddedDocument.RelevanceScore
member.summary: Relevance score from similarity search (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Context.EmbeddedDocument.Metadata
member.summary: Optional metadata about the document (e.g., page number, section, etc.).

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Decorators.LLMLoggingClientDecorator
member.summary: Decorator for ILLMClient that logs all LLM calls to a repository. Provider-agnostic and works with any ILLMClient implementation.

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Extensions.LLMLoggingInitializationService
member.summary: Background service that initializes the LLM logging database on startup and periodically cleans up old logs.

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Extensions.LLMLoggingServiceExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring LLM logging services.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Extensions.LLMLoggingServiceExtensions.AddLLMLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds LLM logging services to the service collection. Call this before registering ILLMClient implementations.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Extensions.LLMLoggingServiceExtensions.DecorateWithLogging(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Decorates an ILLMClient registration with logging. Use this after registering your ILLMClient implementation.

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.ILLMLogRepository
member.summary: Repository for storing and retrieving LLM call logs.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.ILLMLogRepository.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes the database schema if needed.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.ILLMLogRepository.LogCallAsync(Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Logs an LLM call to the database.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.ILLMLogRepository.GetLogsAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves logs matching the specified filters.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.ILLMLogRepository.GetTotalCostAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the total cost for a specific time period and optional filters.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.ILLMLogRepository.GetTokenUsageAsync(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the total token usage for a specific time period and optional filters.

member.name: M:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.ILLMLogRepository.CleanupOldLogsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes logs older than the specified retention period.

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog
member.summary: Represents a complete log entry for an LLM API call. Captures request metadata, messages, responses, token usage, and cost estimation.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.CallId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this LLM call.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ParentCallId
member.summary: If this call was made as part of a function call or tool chain, this references the parent call.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.Username
member.summary: Username of the user who initiated this request.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ProjectId
member.summary: Project ID/name for this request (if applicable).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ResponseMessage
member.summary: The actual response message text from the LLM (for easy viewing/querying). This is extracted from ResponseData for convenience.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.Feature
member.summary: Feature/module that initiated this LLM call (e.g., "Chat", "Analysis", "BlogGeneration").

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.Step
member.summary: Optional step within a feature (e.g., "ColorSchemeGeneration", "PromptEnhancement").

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.DateTimeUtc
member.summary: Timestamp when the call was initiated (UTC).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.Provider
member.summary: LLM provider name (e.g., "OpenAI", "Anthropic", "Google").

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.Model
member.summary: Model name (e.g., "gpt-4", "claude-3-opus", "gemini-pro").

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.IsToolCall
member.summary: Indicates if this call was a tool/function call.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ToolName
member.summary: If IsToolCall is true, the name of the tool that was called.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ToolArguments
member.summary: If IsToolCall is true, the arguments passed to the tool (JSON format).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.RequestMessages
member.summary: Complete request messages sent to the LLM (serialized as JSON).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ResponseData
member.summary: Complete response data from the LLM (serialized as JSON).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.MessageCount
member.summary: Number of messages in the request.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.EmbeddedDocuments
member.summary: Embedded documents/context added via RAG/similarity search (serialized as JSON). Includes document names, chunks, and relevance scores.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.EmbeddedDocumentCount
member.summary: Number of documents/chunks added to context via embeddings.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.InputTokens
member.summary: Number of tokens used in the input/request.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.OutputTokens
member.summary: Number of tokens used in the output/response.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.TotalTokens
member.summary: Total tokens used (typically InputTokens + OutputTokens).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.InputCost
member.summary: Estimated cost for input tokens (in USD).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.OutputCost
member.summary: Estimated cost for output tokens (in USD).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.TotalCost
member.summary: Total estimated cost (InputCost + OutputCost, in USD).

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ExecutionTimeMs
member.summary: Execution time in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.Success
member.summary: Whether the call completed successfully.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.ErrorMessage
member.summary: If Success is false, contains the error message.

member.name: P:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.Models.LLMCallLog.CreatedAt
member.summary: When this log entry was created in the database (UTC).

member.name: T:Hazina.Observability.LLMLogs.Storage.SqliteLLMLogRepository
member.summary: SQLite implementation of LLM log repository.
